tests.title: should successfully add a car and fuel expense for it
tests.fullTitle: Garage and Fuel Expenses Flow should successfully add a car and fuel expense for it

err.message:
CypressError: `Cypress.env()` does not work when `allowCypressEnv` is set to `false`. Please migrate to `cy.env()` or leverage other stateful methods to manage variables. The variable being accessed was: `userEmail`

https://on.cypress.io/cypress-env-migration

Because this error occurred during a `before each` hook we are skipping the remaining tests in the current suite: `Garage and Fuel Expenses Flow`
